summary: End-to-end testing of EMANATOR_NEW_PIPELINE third dogfood run. NEW FEATURE (ArchetypeHint): PASSED - Purple hint card appears correctly with 'SaaS tool / B2B software' label and auto-routes 'login · signup · forgot_password · dashboard'. CRITICAL ASSERTION 1 (No double-escape): PASSED - All files have actual newlines. CRITICAL ASSERTION 2 (No camelCase drift): PASSED - All symbol names are lowercase (signup, login, logout). CRITICAL ASSERTION 3 (Preview renders): FAILED - 'useAuth is not a function' error in Navbar component. CRITICAL ASSERTION 4 (BriefProgressCard persists): FAILED - Card not visible after build completion.

ui_bugs.issue: Card does not persist after build completion. The card should remain visible showing 'complete' status and elapsed time (data-testid='brief-elapsed-time'), but it disappears after the build finishes.

integration_issues.issue: Runtime error 'useAuth is not a function' in Navbar component (line 13). The code generation is CORRECT (useAuth is properly exported from AuthContext.jsx), but the preview iframe fails to execute it. This may be a preview compilation/bundling issue, not a code generation issue.

action_items: SYMBOL-NAME FIX VERIFIED: The '★ EXACT SYMBOL NAMES' section in brief-builder.js and brief-reviewer.js is working. All generated code uses lowercase 'signup', 'login', 'logout'.
DOUBLE-ESCAPE FIX VERIFIED: Files have actual newlines, no literal \n strings.

FIX PREVIEW RUNTIME ERROR: The 'useAuth is not a function' error occurs despite correct code generation. Investigate the preview iframe's module resolution/bundling. The AuthContext.jsx correctly exports useAuth, but Navbar.jsx fails to call it.

FIX BRIEFPROGRESSCARD PERSISTENCE: The card disappears after build completion. Check useDashboardStream.js onMessageSaved handler - the briefProgress metadata may not be preserved correctly when the message is saved.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: ArchetypeHint component works correctly - shows 'SaaS tool / B2B software' with auto-routes
PASS: Navbar.jsx uses 'const { user, isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuth()' (lowercase)
ISSUE: Preview iframe fails with 'useAuth is not a function' despite correct code - may be module resolution issue
ISSUE: BriefProgressCard not visible after build completion - metadata preservation issue in onMessageSaved
seed_data_creation: Created NexsaraFinal project with Creative Brief: Brand='NexsaraFinal', Description='A SaaS workspace for marketing teams to automate campaigns across SEO, ads, and email', Pages='Home, Features, Pricing' (NOT Sign Up/Login/Dashboard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The symbol-name fix is WORKING - all generated code uses lowercase function names. The preview error 'useAuth is not a function' is NOT a code generation issue - the code is correct. It's likely a preview iframe module resolution/bundling issue. The BriefProgressCard disappears after build completion - check the onMessageSaved handler in useDashboardStream.js.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_preview_error: The 'useAuth is not a function' error occurs in the preview iframe despite AuthContext.jsx correctly exporting useAuth. The issue is likely in how the preview iframe compiles/bundles the modules. The import statement 'import { useAuth } from '../components/AuthContext'' may not be resolving correctly in the sandboxed preview environment.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_briefprogresscard: The BriefProgressCard disappears after build completion. In useDashboardStream.js onMessageSaved handler (line 553-587), the briefProgress metadata is supposed to be preserved with 'status: complete', but the card is not rendering. The issue may be in how the metadata is merged or in the LeftPanel.jsx rendering logic.
reproduction_steps: 1. Login to Emanator with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER / REDACTED_LEAKED_PASSWORD
2. Click 'Start Building' and fill Creative Brief with Brand='NexsaraFinal', Description='A SaaS workspace for marketing teams...'
3. Select Pages: Home, Features, Pricing (NOT Sign Up/Login/Dashboard)
4. Click 'Build Project' and wait for pipeline to complete (~2-3 minutes)
5. Observe: BriefProgressCard disappears after build completes
6. Click Preview tab - see 'useAuth is not a function' error
7. Click Code tab - verify all files have correct lowercase function names
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: For preview error: Check the preview iframe's module bundling logic. For BriefProgressCard: Debug the onMessageSaved handler to ensure briefProgress metadata is preserved.

new_pipeline_verification.archetype_hint_feature: PASS - Purple hint card appears with 'SaaS tool / B2B software' and auto-routes 'login · signup · forgot_password · dashboard'
new_pipeline_verification.archetype_classification: PASS - Classified as 'SaaS tool / B2B software'
new_pipeline_verification.wave_building: PASS - All 4 waves completed (scaffold, public, auth, app)
new_pipeline_verification.double_escape_fix: PASS - Files have actual newlines, no literal \n strings
new_pipeline_verification.symbol_name_fix: PASS - All function names are lowercase (signup, login, logout)
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_2: PASS - No camelCase drift (signup not signUp)
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_3: FAIL - Preview error 'useAuth is not a function' (code is correct, preview bundling issue)
new_pipeline_verification.key_assertion_4: FAIL - BriefProgressCard not visible after build completion
